summary: Production readiness smoke regression PASSED. Backend: 16/16 pytest tests green in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_17_smoke.py — health, admin+dispatch login, 401 on no-token, 403 on dispatch→admin-only, modules (pdi active, no dqms), master-dispatch record has pdi field, /api/pdi/templates total=121 (~120 expected), /api/pdi/reports with sample_count, /api/pdi/masters/inspectors, /api/documents/types (7 types, PDI required_for_asn=true), /api/asn/records, /api/reports/kpis (PDI counters present), /api/system/status healthy, PDI E2E generate → PDI-0021 report_no returned, each of the observation rows has exactly 5 samples, PDF endpoint returns application/pdf, DELETE cleanup ok, /api/pdi/templates/{id}/source.pdf returns 200 application/pdf. Frontend: admin login → /portal dashboard loads; all 9 portal routes (/portal, /portal/master-dispatch/list, /portal/modules/{packing,asn,eway-bill,vendor-ack,pdi}, /portal/reports, /portal/settings) render correct h1 with zero error-boundary and zero console errors. Master Dispatch List columns include PDI (position 9 of 11). AI PDI Generator has 3 tabs: Generate/Reports/Template Library. Reports dashboard shows PENDING PDI + COMPLETED PDI KPI cards (COMPLETED PDI=3) and PDI status column in ERP table. Settings has User Management, Company Profile, Audit Logs, Masters, System Status tabs. Sign Out redirects to /login. Test-created data cleaned up (PDI-0021 deleted).
critical_code_review_comments: Deploy audit fixes look good — no functional regression detected. backup.sh/restore.sh syntax already validated by main agent; not executed here per instructions.

Minor: /api/pdi/templates paginates at 25 default with no way to raise page_size beyond that (page_size=200 ignored). Total in envelope is correct, but a caller wanting all templates in one shot needs to loop pages. Not a bug, just documenting.

Minor: there is no GET /api/pdi/reports/{report_id} single-doc endpoint (only /pdf, /regenerate, DELETE, and list). If UI ever needs to fetch one report's full JSON, it must filter the list — worth considering adding.
seed_data_creation: None persisted. Test PDI report PDI-0021 was created by test_pdi_generate_e2e and deleted in the same test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portal routes are under /portal/* (not /master-dispatch etc.). Dispatch List route is /portal/master-dispatch/list. Module routes are /portal/modules/{key}. Settings Masters sub-tab hosts PDI Inspectors/Approvers/Dispatch Document Types panels (verified in iteration_16). PDI templates endpoint paginates; use body.total (121) not len(items). PDI generate returns id + report_no + observations (list-of-lists, 5 samples each). No GET /pdi/reports/{id} — use list + /pdf + DELETE.
